jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Craftsvilla! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
